The '''E-2 Asteroid Miner''' was a craft used for mining [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] in [[3999 BBY]].

[[File:MarauderStarjacker_egvv.jpg|thumb|left|180px|''[[Marauder Starjacker]]'' [[:Category:Technical drawing images|schematics]].]]

Vehicles of that class, having an insectoid appearance, were common throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] as they were a cheaper alternative to using [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beams]] to drag asteroids. [[Pirate/Legends|Pirates]] were known to use E-2s.

E-2 Asteroid Miners had rugged claws which could cling on to the hard rocky surface of an asteroid and [[Plasma drill/Legends|plasma drills]] for cutting through them. E-2s were also equipped with thruster jets for transporting asteroids to mining locations. A central suction tube would draw the material up into the vehicle's filter system where the valuable ores were stored in cargo bays.

*''[[Marauder Starjacker]]''
